data.title:
Your case studies are stuck.
We get them done.
paragraphs: eCommerce platforms and agencies trust us to produce white-label case studies that close deals. Hundreds published since 2018.

data.title: Why case studies never get done
data.subtitle: You know you need them. Your sales team is asking for them. But three things keep getting in the way.

items.title: Your marketing team is already stretched thin
items.text: Your team is buried in product launches, partner events, and campaign deadlines. Case studies keep getting pushed to next quarter. Then the quarter after that.

items.title: Generic writers produce generic stories
items.text: You hired a freelancer. They asked what headless commerce means. The draft read like a press release. The merchant hated it. You started over.

items.title: The merchant disappeared
items.text: You got internal approval. You drafted the outreach. The merchant said sure, let's do it. Then silence. Three follow-ups later, the project is dead.

data.title: How we get your case studies from stuck to published
data.subtitle: Writing starts at step 3. Not after all interviews. That's why we deliver in weeks, not months.

steps.title: Brand Voice
steps.text: We learn your brand standards, tone, and format preferences. This is a onetime investment that pays off across every case study.

steps.title: Research
steps.text: We dig into the merchant's business, industry, platform implementation, and tech stack before anyone gets on a call.

steps.title: Interview the Stakeholder
steps.text: We interview your team. The draft starts here. Not after. Here. By the time we reach the merchant, the story is already taking shape.

steps.title: Interview the Agency
steps.text: We talk to the implementation partner. The draft gets sharper. Real technical details go in. Composable architecture, ERP integrations, checkout customization.

steps.title: Interview the Merchant
steps.text: By now the case study is 70% written. The merchant sees a draft, adds their perspective, and approves. If they can't participate, you still have a deliverable.

steps.title: Write and Refine
steps.text: Our writer has been embedded since step 1. They go back for more detail, tighten the narrative, and run revision rounds with all parties.

steps.title: Extract Assets
steps.text: We pull key metrics for graphics, create social proof snippets, and clip interview highlights for premium deliverables.

steps.title: Format and Brand
steps.text: Final case study gets formatted to your brand template. PDF, web-ready, CMS-compatible. Whatever you need.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.text: You get a finished, branded case study ready to publish under your name. We're never credited. That's the point.

data.title: From backlog to published in weeks
paragraphs: Most companies do case studies sequentially. Schedule all interviews, wait, write, wait for approvals. We write in parallel and remove the biggest bottleneck: the merchant.
Our parallel production process means writing starts at interview one. Roadblocks don't kill the project. Busy merchants don't stall the pipeline.

data.title: The only case study team built for eCommerce
paragraphs: We speak B2B buyer portals, composable architecture, ERP integrations, and replatforming. Your writer won't ask what headless commerce means.

Brent Peterson has conducted over 700 interviews with eCommerce leaders on Talk Commerce. Isaac brings professional journalism experience. The writing team are trained researchers. This is not a content mill.

We've been in eCommerce and retail since 1992. When we interview a merchant about their BigCommerce migration or Shopware implementation, we already know the landscape. That's why the stories are technically credible and the merchants enjoy the process.

data.title: What makes us different
data.subtitle: Why platforms and agencies choose Content Cucumber over generalist content agencies.

items.title: We understand complex technology stories
items.text: eCommerce platforms, SaaS companies, B2B services. We understand replatforming, ERP integrations, composable architecture, and the three-party dynamic between platform, agency, and merchant.

items.title: 700+ executive interviews
items.text: Our team has conducted over 700 interviews with business and technology leaders on Talk Commerce. We know what questions to ask and when to dig deeper.

items.title: We deliver in weeks, not months
items.text: Our parallel production process means writing starts during the first interview. By the time the client gets on the call, the draft is already taking shape.

items.title: Your writer from day one
items.text: The writer is assigned at kickoff, attends interviews, and refines continuously. No handoff gap. No briefing document that misses the point.

items.title: 30+ years in commerce and retail
items.text: Our team brings 30+ years of eCommerce and retail experience, professional journalism backgrounds, and trained research skills. This is not a content mill.

items.title: We handle volume at scale
items.text: 40+ writers on our bench. One platform client commissioned 34 case studies. Our parallel production process handles volume without sacrificing quality. Batch pricing with prepaid packages.

data.title: Questions we hear from platforms and agencies

items.question: Can't we just do this in-house?
items.answer: You can. But can your marketing team dedicate 26 hours per case study? That's coordinating 3-4 stakeholder interviews, writing a technically credible story, producing social assets, and formatting to brand. Most teams say they will, then it sits in the backlog for months.

items.question: How do you handle it when the merchant ghosts?
items.answer: We start writing at the stakeholder interview. By the time we reach the merchant, we already have a solid draft to show them. Clients who can see a draft are far more likely to participate than if they're starting from a blank page. And if they still can't participate, you still get a case study built from platform and agency interviews. The project doesn't die.

items.question: How much does a case study cost?
items.answer: It depends on the format and scope. We offer everything from short success stories to full premium packages with video. Let's talk about what you need and we'll give you a straight answer.

items.question: Do you only do eCommerce?
items.answer: No. Our roots are in eCommerce but we write case studies for SaaS companies, technology platforms, agencies, solar energy, HR tech, healthcare, and more. If your business has a complex story to tell, we know how to tell it.

items.question: Can we see samples?
items.answer: Yes. We have samples available across multiple industries including eCommerce, SaaS, solar energy, HR tech, and appointment scheduling. Some are named with client permission, others are anonymized. Ask us and we'll share samples relevant to your industry.

items.question: What if we need 20+ case studies?
items.answer: That's where we shine. Batch pricing with prepaid packages. One platform client commissioned 34 case studies. Our parallel production process handles volume without sacrificing quality.
